name: brain-ops
notes: Use brain-ops as the deterministic execution layer.

tools.name: handle_input
tools.purpose: Route and execute safe actions from natural language.

tools.name: route_input
tools.purpose: Classify natural language without side effects.

tools.name: daily_summary
tools.purpose: Write structured day summaries into the Obsidian vault.

tools.name: daily_status
tools.purpose: Read a compact daily state snapshot across diet, macros, habits, spending, supplements, and workouts.

tools.name: macro_status
tools.purpose: Compare actual macros against stored macro targets or the active diet.

tools.name: diet_status
tools.purpose: Compare actual intake against the active diet plan.

tools.name: update_diet_meal
tools.purpose: Change one meal inside the active diet plan.

tools.name: daily_habits
tools.purpose: Read habit status summaries from SQLite.

tools.name: habit_status
tools.purpose: Compare habit completion against stored habit targets.

tools.name: budget_status
tools.purpose: Compare actual spending against stored budget targets.

tools.name: body_metrics_status
tools.purpose: Read body metrics summaries from SQLite.

tools.name: capture
tools.purpose: Create a note in the vault from natural language.

tools.name: improve_note
tools.purpose: Improve structure of an existing note.

tools.name: research_note
tools.purpose: Enrich a note with grounded research.
